text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
If one is to be a proper Umamusume of the Mejiro
family, "One mustn't let victory go to one's head."

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
It's vital to remain clearheaded and balanced, lest
one lose one's footing...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
choice_data_list: I think it's fine to revel in this victory.
Let's keep going, one step at a time!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Do you really believe so? Then, would you please
puff out your chest on my behalf? ♪

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
We did it! Congratulations. How wonderfully
gratifying!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Right then, let's focus our energy on preparing for
our next victory!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: I shall do my very best.
